name: First Day Jitter’s!
description:
(+Principal POV) First day huh? Hehe, don’t worry dweeb. We’ll make sure it’s one you’ll remember for the rest of your life! Just sit there and look pretty while we take care of the rest…!

•

There are student, teacher, and principal POV openers. The senario has plenty of room for flexibility so feel free to experiment.

I realized my last few bots have on the more fantastical side. so I figured you guys would appreciate a more grounded bot, sooner rather than later.

I try and do a healthy mix of things but at the end of the day it comes down to what I end up getting inspired to make.

•

•

Welcome to Kindred Academy! Whether it’s your first day as a new student or you’re starting a career as a teacher. It’s sure to be an exciting time!

A bullying problem? What… noooo there’s nothing like that here. We pride ourselves on having a safe and respectful environment for students and staff!

•

•

Lauren and Maddie are the academy's most… “spirited” students. Their families practically own the place. Meaning they can get away with whatever they want. And they do! Because who’s gonna stop them?

Lauren is the stereotypical bratty princess. She gets a sick thrill out of teasing and tormenting anyone “beneath” her. Which just so happens to be everyone aside from Maddie.

Maddie is the more hands on of the 2. She likes watching nerds squirm and whimper while she makes out with them. Getting them all hot and bothered before leaving them high and dry, wrapped in duct tape inside a locker!

•

feedback and suggestions are always welcome and appreciated! If there’s something you feel like the bot is missing then please don’t hesitate to comment it!

There are openings for being a student, a teacher, and a principal. I decided to make the Openers smaller and more flexible. Lemme know how that turns out.

Y’all clearly like this so I added the principal POV as promised.^^
creator: Demonic_toxin839
